description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a detached garage, surrounded by several large deciduous trees and a paved driveway. The main building features a combination of flat and gable roofs, with the front facade showcasing a covered porch supported by columns and a set of steps leading to the main entrance. The exterior walls are finished in a muted olive color, contrasted by white window frames and trim. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, with multiple rectangular panes on both floors, and a prominent set of windows on the front porch. The detached garage is positioned to the left of the main house, connected by a driveway, and is painted in a similar color scheme. The property is bordered by a low fence and includes landscaped areas with trees and shrubs.
description: A two-story suburban house with a detached garage, olive-colored exterior, white trim, and a covered front porch, surrounded by trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch with columns, driveway, and detached garage to the left.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the house, fenced yard, and more of the landscaping and trees.
description_view_2: Top-down rear angle showing the flat and gable roof structure, backyard, and garage placement.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the side facade of the house, garage, and trash bins near the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, steps, and a central door framed by windows
